ham.subject: Account Alert: Recent Transaction on Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We hope you are doing well. This is a notification from your bank regarding a recent transaction on your account.

• Date: 15 April 2026
• Amount: ₹5,000.00
• Merchant: ABC Retail (POS ID: 123456)
• Balance after transaction: ₹12,345.67

If you recognize this transaction, no action is required. If you did not authorize this payment, please contact us immediately at the customer service number listed on your statement or log in to your online banking portal to report the issue.

Thank you for choosing our services.

Best Regards,
Your Bank Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Verification Required
spam.body:
Respected Taxpayer,

This is a formal notice from the Income Tax Department regarding your pending tax refund for the year 2025. As per our records, a refund amount of ₹25,000.00 is due to you. However, before processing the refund, we need to verify certain details to comply with anti-fraud policies.

Please click on the link below to confirm your identity and provide the requested information. This step is mandatory; failure to comply will result in a delay of the refund and a possible hold on your account.

<URL>

We urge you to complete this verification within 24 hours to avoid any inconvenience. The department appreciates your cooperation and looks forward to resolving this matter promptly.

Thank you for your attention.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
